name: Cactus
description: A shadcn/tweakcn-compatible system to be coded from the Cactus light and dark design-system boards: sage cactus structure, sand and ochre surfaces, bloom-pink signals, needle-cream detail, dry shadow depth, and sturdy field-tool controls.
typography: Geist for rugged English product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese headings, body, labels, maps, and numeric field status.
layout: Precise 8px tool grids, ribbed section dividers, sand-texture panels, high-visibility states, compact dashboard density, and durable field-control hierarchy.
